title: Sornsen
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''Sornsen''' was a group of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] scheduled to deliver a batch of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] under the escort of [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] group [[Shurik]]. However despite this amount of protection they were destroyed by an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]] and the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Chip (CR90 corvette)|''Chip'']] and corvette group ''[[Yogi]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
